title: CitationRegistry
description: The canonical internal data model citetab produces for one run, per docs/INPUT_OUTPUT_SPEC.md section 4. Every output (the regenerated .docx TOA and the Markdown report) is a rendering of this structure. It pairs with src/citetab/models/registry.py, which mirrors it field for field; tests cross-validate the two in both directions. Occurrence.page is nullable here (deviating from spec section 4.2's [req] marker) so a partial registry can represent an occurrence not yet located by a render; a converged registry populates every page.

authorities.description: Every resolved authority in the brief. May be empty for a brief that cites nothing.

occurrence.description: A single reference to an authority in the brief body, in any form.

form.description: Citation form, as classified by eyecite resolution.

raw_text.description: Verbatim text of the occurrence as it appears in the brief.

paragraph_index.description: Index of the paragraph in the .docx body where the occurrence appears.

char_span.description: Inclusive-exclusive character offsets [start, end) within the paragraph.

confidence.description: high = exact text-span match in the render; medium = approximated location.

page.description: Page in the converged render, or null before a render has located the occurrence.

pincite.description: Pinpoint reference within the cited authority, or null when absent.

authority.description: One resolved authority and every occurrence that refers to it.

authority_id.description: Stable-within-a-run identifier, deterministically derived from the authority.

type.description: The kind of authority; drives the TOA group via the profile's types map.

components.description: Normalized parts of the citation (reporter/volume/page/court/year, or code/section, etc.).

display_full.description: Full citation form as rendered in the TOA.

group.description: TOA grouping bucket, per the active court profile.

occurrences.description: Every reference to this authority, in every form.

pages.description: Sorted, de-duplicated brief pages where any occurrence lands.

passim.description: True when the distinct-page count exceeds the profile's passim threshold.

display_short.description: Short citation form, or null when not derivable.

font_substitution.description: A single font the render engine substituted.

substitute.description: The font the render engine used in its place.

run_metadata.description: Run-level provenance for the whole registry, per spec section 4.3.

engine_version.description: Semantic version of the citetab engine.

rule_pack_version.description: Semantic version of the toa rule pack.

profile_id.description: Identifier of the court profile in force (e.g. frap).

profile_version.description: Semantic version of the court profile in force.

font_substitution_occurred.description: Whether the render substituted any font; gates TT-008.

iteration_count.description: Number of convergence iterations the run took.

converged.description: Whether pagination stabilized within the cap; false gates TT-007.

input_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the input .docx, for provenance.

font_substitutions.description: The substitution pairs, when any occurred; empty otherwise.
